goal: Ship v8.0 Externalized Organization Runtime first bounded slice.
risk: AOF could treat external actors tools providers or references as runtime truth without governed resource/use contracts and approval boundaries.
loss_boundary: No v8.0 release claim without external resource records use records audit release-state integration Mission Control projection TASK-100 evidence tests and smoke.

stop_conditions: stop if v8.0 claims autonomous external execution or semantic truth
